zh.lifeSummary: Margery de Burwardeslegh是Warin de Burwardeslegh和Melete Perverell的女兒，於大約1183年出生在英國史洛普爾布洛瑟利。她於大約1203年與John  de Bagot - First Lord of Blymhill在英國英格蘭史洛普爾布洛瑟利結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和2個女兒的父母。她去世於大約1259年在英國斯塔福爾布萊爾享年78歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: Margery de Burwardeslegh是Warin de Burwardeslegh和Melete Perverell的女儿，于大约1183年出生在英国史洛普爾布洛瑟利。她于大约1203年与John  de Bagot - First Lord of Blymhill在英国英格兰史洛普爾布洛瑟利结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和2个女儿的父母。她去世于大约1259年在英国斯塔福爾布萊爾享年78岁。

nameMeanings.name: Margery
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: The usual medieval vernacular form of   Margaret   (now also commonly spelled   Marjorie  ). This form of the name is preserved in the nursery rhyme ‘See-saw, Margery Daw’.

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Short form of the various boys' names with the first syllable Ed-, especially Edward .

variants.name: Edward
meanings: From an Old English personal name derived from ēad ‘prosperity, riches’ + weard ‘guard’. This has been one of the most successful of all Old English names, in frequent use from before the Conquest to the present day, and even being exported into other European languages. It was the name of three Anglo-Saxon kings and has been borne by eight kings of England since the Norman Conquest. It is also the name of the youngest son of Queen Elizabeth II . The most influential early bearer was King Edward the Confessor ( ?1002–66 ; ruled 1042–66 ). In a troubled period of English history, he contrived to rule fairly and (for a time at any rate) firmly. But in the latter part of his reign he paid more attention to his religion than to his kingdom. He died childless, and his death sparked off conflicting claims to his throne, which were resolved by the victory of William the Conqueror at the Battle of Hastings. His memory was honoured by Normans and English alike, for his fairness and his piety. Edward's mother was Norman; he had spent part of his youth in Normandy; and William claimed to have been nominated by Edward as his successor. Edward was canonized in the 12th century, and came to be venerated throughout Europe as a model of a Christian king.

historicEvents.title: Magna Carta
historicEvents.description: King John of England agreed to a charter of rights called the Magna Carta. The document was originally drafted by the Archbishop of Canterbury to establish peace between King John and a group of rebel barons. The Magna Carta was completed in 1215 and is now considered to be one of the greatest constitutional documents of all time.

historicEvents.title: France Declares War on England
historicEvents.description: France declared war on England as Louis VIII of France attacked Poitou and northern Gascony.

historicEvents.title: 100 Years of Conflict Between England and France Ends
historicEvents.description: Treaty of Paris was signed on December 4, 1259, which ended 100 years of conflict between England and France.

en.lifeSummary: Margery de Burwardeslegh was born about 1183, in Broseley, Shropshire, England as the daughter of Warin de Burwardeslegh and Melete Perverell. She married John  de Bagot - First Lord of Blymhill about 1203, in Broseley, Shropshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 2 daughters. She died about 1259, in Blymhill, Staffordshire, England, at the age of 78.

fr.lifeSummary: Margery de Burwardeslegh est née environ 1183, à Broseley, Shropshire, Angleterre, fille de Warin de Burwardeslegh et Melete Perverell. Elle a épousé John  de Bagot - First Lord of Blymhill environ 1203, à Broseley, Shropshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 2 filles. Elle est décédée environ 1259, à Blymhill, Staffordshire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 78 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Margery de Burwardeslegh wurde um 1183 in Broseley, Shropshire, England, als Tochter von Warin de Burwardeslegh und Melete Perverell geboren. Sie hat um 1203 in Broseley, Shropshire, England, United Kingdom John  de Bagot - First Lord of Blymhill geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Sie starb um 1259 im Alter von 78 Jahren in Blymhill, Staffordshire, England.

it.lifeSummary: Margery de Burwardeslegh è nata il circa 1183 nel Broseley, Shropshire, England come figlia di Warin de Burwardeslegh e Melete Perverell. Lei sposato John  de Bagot - First Lord of Blymhill circa 1203, nel Broseley, Shropshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 2 figlie. Morì circa 1259, nel Blymhill, Staffordshire, England, all'età di 78 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Margery de Burwardesleghは約1183年にイギリスシュロプシュアイアブローセリーでWarin de BurwardesleghとMelete Perverellの娘として生まれた。約1203年にイギリスイギリスシュロプシュアイアブローセリーでJohn  de Bagot - First Lord of Blymhillと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼女は約1259年にイギリススタフォードシュアイアブリムヒルで78歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Margery de Burwardeslegh(은)는 대략 1183년 영국 슈럽실르 브로즈리에서 Warin de Burwardeslegh(와)과 Melete Perverell의 딸로 태어났다. 그녀는 대략 1203년 영국 잉글랜드 슈럽실르 브로즈리에서 John  de Bagot - First Lord of Blymhill(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 대략 1259년 영국 스태퍼드실르 블림힐에서 78세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Margery de Burwardeslegh nasceu aproximadamente 1183, em Broseley, Shropshire, Inglaterra filha de Warin de Burwardeslegh e Melete Perverell. Ela casou-se com John  de Bagot - First Lord of Blymhill aproximadamente 1203, em Broseley, Shropshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 2 filhas. Ela faleceu aproximadamente 1259, em Blymhill, Staffordshire, Inglaterra, com 78 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Margery de Burwardeslegh родилась около 1183 г. в местности бросели, шропшир, Англия. Её родителей звали Warin de Burwardeslegh и Melete Perverell. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени John  de Bagot - First Lord of Blymhill около 1203 г. в местности бросели, шропшир, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 2 дочери. Она умерла около 1259 г. в местности блимхилл, стаффордшир, Англия в возрасте 78 лет.
